Aurita Rouse always before your Exalt for additional Tentacle Slaps.
Corpo Exalt is a defensive Exalt granting additional shield when you go White Stance Tentacles.
Murphy Exalt grants you a extra temporary Tentacle when playing one of her cards, with additional 1 Arithma worth of Keyflare.
Ramona Exalt makes it so all her cards refund 1 Arithma.

Prioritize what you need for each boss fight.

Wait is corpos playstyle is using her cards to make those 0 cost and not just using them or am i supposed to use them? <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

Corpo 4 Cost “Lightning Retribution” (which I assume you didn’t read) have Retain/Prepare/Aftershock. Retain keeps it in hand. Prepare -1 Arithma every turn. Aftershock effect is, “After Discarded put it at the top of your deck”. Corpo’s Exalt is redraw your full hand. The 0 cost “Pilots” have Aftershock with “Gain X STR and gain X Tentacle Dmg”, but can be played if you do need the shields or dont wanna overbloat your deck.

You can use it whenever, but ideally, you run a discard comp, but you don’t have a Tulu. You can run the “Discard Hand and Draw back Cards” Posse to make it even cheaper. Another thing is ideally, you set up a “Burst Turn” for bosses, and scale or setup before the burst turn.

guys what's a better ultra character between erica and daffodil for a ultra/chaos team

Erica is a support and Daffodil is a dps
So whichever one you would prefer in those roles

i just don't know which one to pick 🤔
Well what role do you think u need? DPS or Support?
i have like 2 support and jenkin as dps
Then the last slot is just filler in ur eyes. In that case a support like Erica would make more sense
And what was ur conclusion? Did u need more dmg, shielding, or were you just bored?

daffodil pros : exalt lets u get ultra round quicker, more versatile generated cards (which u probably dont need since u can reliably vulnerable or build str with ogier).
cons : useless rouse, needs building in exploration for the 3 cost card to be okay (and its still heavily underwhelming in bosses).
erica pros : 0 cost buff to offense or defense, debuffs on exalt, x card can be used on 0 arthimetca.

i think erica is better in the sense that u would play her cards more than daffodil, and guaranteed debuffs is nice for damage rounds.
jenkin deals more consistent damage than daffodil overall,
